title: Lightning Weapons
description: Gives weapons the power of lightning.
body:
A mod aimed at adding lightning bolts to weapons and armour.
  
  Items:

  Lightning Sword. Lightning Bow. Lightning Stick. Lightning Helmet. Lightning Chestplate. Lightning Leggings. Lightning Boots.

  The sword and bow strike whatever you hit with a lightning bolt. Wear any piece of the lightning armour set and anyone who attacks you gets struck by lightning - you
  also stop taking damage from lightning bolts entirely.

  Recipes:

  Lightning Stick - trident above a stick.
  Lightning Sword - 2 diamonds above a lightning stick.
  Lightning Bow - normal bow shape but with lightning sticks instead of sticks.
  Lightning Helmet / Chestplate / Leggings / Boots - normal armour shape using lightning sticks.

Links:

[Discord](https://www.discord.gg/xaGMZVHfbN) (report bugs and request features here)
